mapper.insert: INSERT INTO drug_usage (name, parent_id, status, sort_order, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{parentId}, #{status}, #{sortOrder}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM drug_usage
name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM drug_usage WHERE parent_id = #{id}

WITH RECURSIVE usage_subtree AS ( SELECT id FROM drug_usage WHERE id = #{usageId} UNION ALL SELECT du.id FROM drug_usage du INNER JOIN usage_subtree us ON du.parent_id = us.id ) SELECT id FROM usage_subtree
mapper.update:
UPDATE drug_usage
name = #{name},
parent_id = #{parentId},
status = #{status},
sort_order = #{sortOrder},
update_time = #{updateTime},
WHERE id = #{id}
